# Nafsam

> Nafsam is a private, invitation-only personal memory archive with a cinematic, dark, luxury aesthetic. The public landing page shows a countdown and a gated entry; all memories — photos, songs, videos, and writings — live behind authentication and are not publicly accessible.

## About
- Nafsam is a personal keepsake site, not a commercial product or service.
- It is multilingual: Arabic, English, Persian (Farsi), and Turkish.
- Only the landing page at the canonical URL below is public. Every other page requires a private login.

## Public pages
- [Nafsam landing page](https://echandska-1.pages.dev/): the only public page — a countdown and a gated entry to the archive.

## Not for crawling
- The archive routes (/home, /moments, /photos, /songs, /videos, /writings, /chat) and the API (/api/) require authentication and contain private personal content. Please do not index or fetch them.
